description:
## app [1.12.4](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.3...v1.12.4) (2026-03-28)


### Bug Fixes

* Fix "Sources are loading" error — patch bundle validation now accepts JVM class file format used by silva-patches v1.21.1
* YouTube, YouTube Music and all other app patches now load correctly
